/home/leon/anaconda3/envs/seg37/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -O3 -flto -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-rpath,/home/leon/anaconda3/envs/seg37/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/leon/anaconda3/envs/seg37/lib -L/home/leon/anaconda3/envs/seg37/lib -shared  -o /home/leon/Documents/Projects/DensePillar/mapping/mapping.cpython-37m-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/mapping.dir/mapping.cpp.o
